scenario.name: Register with IPSec and AKAv1-MD5 Auth
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[field1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch];rport Route: <sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port];lr> From: <sip:[field0]@[field1]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field1]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] REGISTER Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;+sip.instance="<urn:gsma:imei:86253004-794212-0>";+g.3gpp.accesstype="cellular2";audio;video;+g.3gpp.smsip;+g.3gpp.icsi-ref="urn%3Aurn-7%3A3gpp-service.ims.icsi.mmtel" Security-Client: ipsec-3gpp;alg=hmac-sha-1-96;prot=esp;mod=trans;ealg=des-ede3-cbc;spi-c=[$client_spi];spi-s=[$server_spi];port-c=[local_port];port-s=[remote_port],ipsec-3gpp;alg=hmac-sha-1-96;prot=esp;mod=trans;ealg=aes-cbc;spi-c=[$client_spi];spi-s=[$server_spi];port-c=[local_port];port-s=[remote_port],ipsec-3gpp;alg=hmac-sha-1-96;prot=esp;mod=trans;ealg=null;spi-c=[$client_spi];spi-s=[$server_spi];port-c=[local_port];port-s=[remote_port] Require: sec-agree Proxy-Require: sec-agree Supported: path,sec-agree Allow: INVITE,ACK,OPTIONS,BYE,CANCEL,PRACK,NOTIFY,UPDATE,MESSAGE,REFER P-Access-Network-Info: 3GPP-E-UTRAN-FDD;utran-cell-id-3gpp=4600100015EE0000 Authorization: Digest username="[field0]@[field1]",realm="[field1]",uri="sip:[field1]" Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: IM-client/OMA1.0 HW-Rto/V1.0 Expires: [reg_period] Content-Length: 0

recv.action: <ereg regexp="nonce=\"([^\"]*)\"" search_in="hdr" header="WWW-Authenticate" check_it="true" assign_to="temp_header,nonce"/> <ereg regexp="realm=\"([^\"]*)\"" search_in="hdr" header="WWW-Authenticate" check_it="true" assign_to="temp_header,auth_realm"/>

scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[field1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch];rport Route: <sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port];lr> From: <sip:[field0]@[field1]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field1]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] REGISTER Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;+sip.instance="<urn:gsma:imei:86253004-794212-0>";+g.3gpp.accesstype="cellular2";audio;video;+g.3gpp.smsip;+g.3gpp.icsi-ref="urn%3Aurn-7%3A3gpp-service.ims.icsi.mmtel" Security-Client: ipsec-3gpp;alg=hmac-sha-1-96;prot=esp;mod=trans;ealg=des-ede3-cbc;spi-c=[$client_spi];spi-s=[$server_spi];port-c=[local_port];port-s=[remote_port],ipsec-3gpp;alg=hmac-sha-1-96;prot=esp;mod=trans;ealg=aes-cbc;spi-c=[$client_spi];spi-s=[$server_spi];port-c=[local_port];port-s=[remote_port],ipsec-3gpp;alg=hmac-sha-1-96;prot=esp;mod=trans;ealg=null;spi-c=[$client_spi];spi-s=[$server_spi];port-c=[local_port];port-s=[remote_port] Security-Verify: [$security_server] Require: sec-agree Proxy-Require: sec-agree Supported: path,sec-agree Allow: INVITE,ACK,OPTIONS,BYE,CANCEL,PRACK,NOTIFY,UPDATE,MESSAGE,REFER P-Access-Network-Info: 3GPP-E-UTRAN-FDD;utran-cell-id-3gpp=4600100015EE0000 [authentication username="[field0]@[field1]" aka_K="[field5]" aka_OP="[field6]" aka_AMF="[field7]" algorithm="AKAv1-MD5" method="REGISTER" qop="auth-int" cnonce="[authentication_cnonce]"] Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: IM-client/OMA1.0 HW-Rto/V1.0 Expires: [reg_period] Content-Length: 0
